sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js - Improved Overview Design import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview'); if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analyze customer behavior and predict churn risk

🔍

No Analysis Data Available

Run a customer analysis to view insights and predictions

); } const { individualResult, timestamp, customerData } = dashboardData; // Enhanced sample data const analysisData = { churnRisk: 16.1, riskLevel: "low", retentionScore: 84, customerValue: 16250, keyMetrics: { tenure: { value: 5, target: 12, trend: 'up', change: '+2' }, satisfaction: { value: 3, target: 4.5, trend: 'down', change: '-0.8' }, orderFrequency: { value: 2.1, target: 3.5, trend: 'down', change: '-0.4' }, lifetimeValue: { value: 16250, target: 25000, trend: 'up', change: '+1250' }, responseRate: { value: 78, target: 85, trend: 'stable', change: '+2' }, engagement: { value: 65, target: 80, trend: 'down', change: '-5' } }, quickStats: [ { label: 'Days Since Last Order', value: '7 days', status: 'warning' }, { label: 'Total Orders', value: '24', status: 'good' }, { label: 'Avg Order Value', value: '¥8,250', status: 'good' }, { label: 'Coupon Usage', value: '45%', status: 'average' } ], riskFactors: [ { name: 'Satisfaction Score', level: 'High', value: 3, impact: 85 }, { name: 'Order Frequency', level: 'Medium', value: 2.1, impact: 72 }, { name: 'Tenure Duration', level: 'Medium', value: 5, impact: 65 }, { name: 'Engagement Rate', level: 'Low', value: 65, impact: 45 } ] }; // Improved Overview Tab const renderOverview = () => (
{/* Header Stats */}
{analysisData.churnRisk}% Churn Risk
{analysisData.riskLevel.toUpperCase()} RISK Low probability of churn
Retention Score {analysisData.retentionScore}%
Customer Value ¥{analysisData.customerValue.toLocaleString()}
{/* Quick Stats Grid */}
{analysisData.quickStats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.value} {stat.label}
))}
{/* Main Content Grid */}
{/* Key Metrics */}

📈 Key Performance Metrics

Compared to ideal targets
{Object.entries(analysisData.keyMetrics).map(([key, metric]) => (
{key.replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1').replace(/^./, str => str.toUpperCase())}
{metric.trend === 'up' ? '↗' : metric.trend === 'down' ? '↘' : '→'} {metric.change}
{typeof metric.value === 'number' && key !== 'satisfaction' ? (key === 'lifetimeValue' ? `¥${metric.value.toLocaleString()}` : metric.value) : metric.value } {key === 'satisfaction' && '/5'} {(key === 'responseRate' || key === 'engagement') && '%'} Target: { typeof metric.target === 'number' ? (key === 'lifetimeValue' ? `¥${metric.target.toLocaleString()}` : metric.target) : metric.target }{(key === 'responseRate' || key === 'engagement') ? '%' : ''}
= metric.target ? '#10b981' : '#f59e0b' }} >
))}
{/* Risk Factors */}

⚠️ Top Risk Factors

Primary drivers of churn risk
{analysisData.riskFactors.map((factor, index) => (
{factor.name} {factor.value}{factor.name.includes('Score') ? '/5' : factor.name.includes('Rate') ? '%' : ''}
{factor.level} Impact
))}
{/* Quick Insights */}

💡 Quick Insights

Automated recommendations
✅
Strong Customer Value High lifetime value with consistent spending patterns
⚠️
Declining Engagement Reduced order frequency and satisfaction scores
✅
Loyalty Potential Good response rate to marketing campaigns
🎯
Immediate Action Needed Focus on improving satisfaction and engagement
{/* Performance Summary */}

📊 Performance Summary

Overall customer health score
{analysisData.retentionScore}% Health Score
Engagement
65%
Satisfaction
60%
Retention
84%
); // ... (keep the same Detailed Analysis and Action Plan tabs from previous version) return (
{/* Dashboard Header */}

Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard

Analysis completed: {timestamp}

{/* Navigation Tabs */}
{/* Tab Content */}
{activeTab === 'overview' && renderOverview()} {/* {activeTab === 'detailed' && renderDetailedAnalysis()} {activeTab === 'action' && renderActionPlan()} */}
); } export default Dashboard;
